title: Create ConversationRefs TSX component managing conversation reference URLs
job:
Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/ConversationRefs.tsx:
Manages conversation reference URLs. Shows list with: system label, role badge, clickable URL, authoritative star, notes preview. Add button shows form: URL input, system dropdown (Claude/ChatGPT/Other), role dropdown (planning/prd/architecture/review/revision), authoritative checkbox, notes textarea. Edit and Delete per reference. Props: references array, scopeType, scopeId, onAdd, onUpdate, onDelete. Import ConversationReference from ../../worker/types. Inline styles. TypeScript. Commit.
